benefits.description: Micro-stacking low doses of Tirz and Reta maintains appetite suppression while preserving receptor sensitivity and avoiding desensitization
Theoretical framework for sustained weight loss by avoiding receptor downregulation through sub-saturation dosing

protocol_notes: OP proposes a 'micro-stack' theory: combining low-dose Tirzepatide (1.5mg) and Retatrutide (0.75mg) every 4 days to maintain sub-saturation receptor occupancy, prevent internalization/desensitization, and preserve long-term efficacy. OP recommends a 30-day break after extended use to allow receptor resensitization. The post is primarily theoretical/mechanistic rather than a personal usage report, but OP refers to 'my receptors' suggesting personal use.
